title: deyeuxia varia subsp. corsica
intro: Deyeuxia varia subsp. corsica, also known as Corsican grass or Corsican hairgrass, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the grass family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Deyeuxia varia subsp. corsica can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal and health-promoting properties.
